allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "name='\\''AwarenessClaw.exe'\\'' or name='\\''openclaw.exe'\\''" | Select-Object ProcessId,ParentProcessId,@{n='\\''MemMB'\\'';e={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSetSize/1MB,1\)}},CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap')
